settings.question: How long until I see results?
settings.answer: Most customers see visible results within 2–4 weeks of consistent use, morning and night.

settings.question: Are your products suitable for sensitive skin?
settings.answer: Yes — our formulas are fragrance-free and dermatologist tested. We always recommend a patch test first.

settings.question: How does Subscribe & Save work?
settings.answer: Choose “Subscribe & save” on any eligible product to get a discount and free shipping on every refill. Skip, pause, or cancel anytime.

settings.question: What is your shipping policy?
settings.answer: Free standard shipping on orders over $50. Orders ship within 1–2 business days.

settings.question: What is your return policy?
settings.answer: If you’re not happy, return within 30 days for a full refund — even if the bottle is open.
